controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.content: Mohammed El Hanafi — WallStreet Morocco (independent personal project). Contact: mohamed345el@gmail.com — Phone: +33 7 43 52 76 04

data.title: 2. Data Collected
data.account: Account data (if registered): email address, password stored in hashed form (never in plain text), registration date.
data.portfolio: Portfolio data: stocks and funds added by the user, purchase prices, quantities, purchase dates, personal notes.
data.technical: Technical data: IP address (server logs, kept 30 days), browser, operating system, pages visited.
data.notCollected: Data NOT collected: no real banking or financial data, no identity documents, no precise location data, no data sold to third parties.

purposes.title: 3. Purposes of Processing
purposes.content: Account and portfolio operation · Service improvement · Security and abuse prevention · Communication if you contact us

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal Basis (GDPR)
legalBasis.content: Contract performance (user account) · Consent (analytics cookies) · Legitimate interest (service security)

rights.title: 6. Your Rights (Moroccan Law 09-08 + GDPR for EU users)
rights.access: Right of access to your data
rights.erasure: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten')
rights.contact: To exercise these rights: mohamed345el@gmail.com — Response time: maximum 30 days

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.essential: Essential: session, language, UI preferences — always active
cookies.functional: Functional: portfolio history, preferences — require consent
cookies.analytics: Analytics: page views — disabled if refused

security.title: 8. Data Security
security.content: Passwords hashed with bcrypt (12 rounds) · Encrypted communications (HTTPS/TLS) · Restricted data access · HTTP security headers configured

transfers.title: 9. International Transfers
transfers.content: This site is hosted on servers located in Europe (EU-West region). No transfers to third countries without adequate protection.

changes.title: 10. Changes
changes.content: This policy may be updated. Users will be notified by in-app notification. The last updated date will be modified accordingly.

presentation.title: 1. Service Overview
presentation.content: WallStreet Morocco is an independent personal project developed by Mohammed El Hanafi, providing financial information on the Casablanca Stock Exchange (BVC) for educational and informational purposes only.

acceptance.title: 2. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing this site, you accept these terms. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use this service.

disclaimer.title: 3. Nature of Service — Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.warning: WallStreet Morocco is an INFORMATION and FINANCIAL EDUCATION site only.
disclaimer.notProvided: THIS SITE DOES NOT PROVIDE: investment advice · buy or sell recommendations · professional portfolio management · services regulated by AMMC or any regulator
disclaimer.dataDelay: DISPLAYED DATA: is provided with a minimum delay of 15 minutes · may contain errors or inaccuracies · should not be the sole basis for financial decisions
disclaimer.risk: INVESTING INVOLVES RISKS: you may lose all or part of the capital invested. Consult a licensed financial advisor before investing.

account.title: 4. User Account
account.password: You are responsible for the confidentiality of your password.
account.age: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account.
account.oneAccount: Only one account per person is allowed.
account.suspension: We reserve the right to suspend any account in case of abuse.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The content of this site (texts, analyses, code, design) is the property of Mohammed El Hanafi. Any reproduction without authorization is prohibited. Market data comes from third-party sources (BVC, Leboursier.ma, Finnhub, ForexFactory) and remains the property of their respective providers.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: WallStreet Morocco cannot be held responsible for:
liability.losses: Financial losses resulting from the use of information published on this site
liability.decisions: Decisions made based on information published on this site

availability.title: 7. Service Availability
availability.content: This service is provided 'as is', without guarantee of permanent availability. Interruptions may occur for maintenance or technical reasons.

prohibited.title: 8. Prohibited Conduct
prohibited.intro: It is prohibited to use this site to:
prohibited.hacking: Attempt to hack or compromise the security of the site
prohibited.illegal: Publish illegal, defamatory or misleading content

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.content: These terms may be modified. The last updated date will be updated accordingly. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

law.title: 10. Applicable Law
law.content: These terms are governed by Moroccan law. Any dispute will be submitted to the jurisdiction of the courts of Casablanca, Morocco.

cookies.bannerText: We use essential cookies for site operation and functional cookies to enhance your experience (portfolio saving, preferences).

footer.disclaimer: Information published on this site is provided for informational purposes only. It does not constitute investment advice. Investing involves risk of capital loss.
